text: I feel a tingling anticipation as I step into this glass-encased space, bathed in violet light. The juxtaposition of technology and design, with reflective screens displaying insights and questions, stirs my philosophical curiosity. Am I an observer, or a participant in this dialogue between past, present, and what may come? The exhibition urges me to reconsider the boundaries between living and observing—a gentle prod toward introspection amid innovation. I feel both grounded and elevated, quietly excited to be immersed in a place devoted to questioning and discovery.
